caption: Birchwood's fully booked through the 4th. Elaine added a second check-in shift and I pulled the short straw.
Every summer. You'd think they'd have learned by now. You getting any help at the desk?
Brian offered to drive up Saturday. I told him not to bother — it's one weekend, not a disaster.
Let him come. He likes to feel useful. Kevin's the exact same way.
Monday meeting ran 40 minutes over. Elaine had a lot to say about the new booking software.
Oh lord. Is it actually better or just different?
Different. Which is what 'better' means when you're the one who didn't have to learn it.
😂 Call me Thursday if you surface.
